_comment: Known false positive — 2017 low-vol regime. VIX printed 9.19 on 2017-10-05 against a 20-trading-day window also clustered in 9.45–12.12 (median 10.16). Trader truth: this is structural carry-trade complacency, not a tradeable event — the same regime that preceded Volmageddon four months later. ECDF rank-within-quiet-window pathology emits 0.90 because the window is so tight that any drift looks unusual. xfail(strict=True) pins the gap; when a noise-zone floor lands and severity drops into the trader band, the test flips and forces an SRS/ADR reckoning.

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: Trader-band, not SRS-formula-band. Window median ≈ 10.16, |deviation|=|9.19-10.16|=0.97. 18 of 20 history |deviations from median| are ≤ 0.97 → SRS CLS-001 ECDF rank = 0.90. But this is a known false positive: VIX at structural lows in 2017's complacency regime — no tradeable signal. A straddle bought on this severity bleeds theta and dies. Trader-defensible severity ≤ 0.20 reflects the regime: 'this is the floor of the floor; nothing happens here.' The test FAILS today and stays failing until a noise-zone gate (absolute-magnitude / vol-of-vol / window-spread filter) lands in SRS CLS-001 — by design.
